title: hyptis radiata
intro: Hyptis radiata, also known as Key Lime Bush or Key West Key Lime, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hyptis radiata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Hyptis radiata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
